results.name: 用户注册（邮箱+密码）

results.name: 空密码注册
results.actual: 前端拒绝提交并聚焦密码字段；页面存在密码错误提示/样式。

直接调用 POST /api/register 且 password 为空返回 400，响应体：{"code":"E_MISSING_OR_INVALID_PARAMS","problems":["Invalid \"password\":  Cannot use '' (empty string) for a required input."],"message":"The server could not fulfill this request (`POST /api/register`) due to 1 missing or invalid parameter."}

results.name: SSO登录
results.expectation: 支持4种SSO提供商完成登录
results.actual: 登录页显示 3 个 SSO 按钮；实际点击 3 个，3 个点击后发生跳转或进入认证流程。公开配置中原生 provider 1 个，OIDC 方法 3 个。
evidence: 登录页 SSO 按钮 title：["Continue with Google","Continue with Microsoft","Continue with GitHub"]

apiEvidence: 首次注册返回 200，响应体：{"item":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCIsImtpZCI6IjRjMmVjMzEyLTBhYTQtNGVkNi05NGUzLTQ4ZjQxOTkxNDgxMiJ9.eyJpYXQiOjE3ODAwNDA3MTUsInN1YiI6IjE3ODU1MDc3OTYxODgzOTk0MzciLCJleHAiOjE4MTE1NzY3MTV9.4ZJcei4bhkAXdVyl3qQs8T_i9QCHPrN2W1mbyuoOPaI"}

results.name: 禁用注册后注册
given: 管理员已关闭注册功能
results.actual: 当前 demo 实例禁止管理员修改注册开关，无法模拟“已关闭注册功能”的 Given；关闭尝试失败后，新用户注册接口仍按当前配置执行。
apiEvidence: 禁用前 GET /api/core-settings-public：{"ssoRegistrationEnabled":true,"localRegistrationEnabled":true,"registrationEnabled":true,"projectCreationAllEnabled":true,"syncSsoDataOnAuth":false,"syncSsoAdminOnAuth":false,"allowedRegisterDomains":"","ssoUrls":{"google":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/google","github":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/github","microsoft":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/microsoft","oidc":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/oidc"},"ssoAvailable":{"google":false,"github":false,"microsoft":false,"oidc":true},"oidcEnabledMethods":["Google","Microsoft","GitHub"],"demoMode":true,"mailServiceAvailable":true,"mailServiceInboundEmail":"demo.4gaboards.com@inbound.4gaboards.com","hyperdxEnabled":false,"hyperdxApiKey":null,"hyperdxInstanceName":"demo.4gaboards.com","hyperdxTracePropagationTargets":null,"otelUrl":null...
管理员 POST /api/core-settings 尝试关闭注册返回 403，响应体：{"code":"E_FORBIDDEN","message":"Insufficient permissions"}

关闭尝试后 GET /api/core-settings-public：{"ssoRegistrationEnabled":true,"localRegistrationEnabled":true,"registrationEnabled":true,"projectCreationAllEnabled":true,"syncSsoDataOnAuth":false,"syncSsoAdminOnAuth":false,"allowedRegisterDomains":"","ssoUrls":{"google":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/google","github":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/github","microsoft":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/microsoft","oidc":"https://demo.4gaboards.com/auth/oidc"},"ssoAvailable":{"google":false,"github":false,"microsoft":false,"oidc":true},"oidcEnabledMethods":["Google","Microsoft","GitHub"],"demoMode":true,"mailServiceAvailable":true,"mailServiceInboundEmail":"demo.4gaboards.com@inbound.4gaboards.com","hyperdxEnabled":false,"hyperdxApiKey":null,"hyperdxInstanceName":"demo.4gaboards.com","hyperdxTracePropagationTargets":null,"otelUrl":null...

关闭尝试后新用户 POST /api/register 返回 200，响应体：{"item":"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCIsImtpZCI6ImQ4MTA4ZmQ1LTU2NTYtNDU5NS05ZTczLWZmNzAyMDRkMGNmMCJ9.eyJpYXQiOjE3ODAwNDA4MzYsInN1YiI6IjE3ODU1MDg4MDU5MzM1MzMwMTYiLCJleHAiOjE4MTE1NzY4MzZ9.YrUgcc4hgJYN9JU1p0_hgqTZlME6EKfJoTpcCWWbP08"}

results.name: 用户级别访问权限（拒绝访问）
given: 尝试访问未被添加的项目或看板
when: 访问未授权项目和看板 URL
results.expectation: 系统应拒绝访问，显示权限不足提示
results.actual: 系统拒绝了未授权访问，但页面显示 Not Found 类提示，未出现明确权限不足提示。
evidence:
看板页面文本摘录：Star 4ga Boards on GitHub!
Your support speeds up development
We'd love to hear your feedback!
It means a lot for us
DP
P
Add Project
Board Not Found

普通用户 GET /api/projects/1785508834555463520 返回 404，响应体：{"code":"E_NOT_FOUND","message":"Project not found"}
